M1800_CU_GROOMING M1800 (M0640) Current Grooming This field indicates the patient's current ability to tend safely to personal hygiene needs. 00 = Able to groom self unaided, with or without the use of assistive devices or adapted methods.
01 = Grooming utensils must be placed within reach before able to complete grooming activities.
02 = Someone must assist the patient
